prompt:
A hyper-realistic lifestyle portrait of a young East Asian woman with a natural real human face, soft skin texture, and subtle makeup. She is leaning casually against a graffiti-covered brick wall while holding a takeaway iced coffee cup in one hand and gently brushing her hair back with the other. She looks slightly off-camera with a calm confident expression.

She wears a white fitted top, oversized beige trench coat, high-waisted straight-leg jeans, and clean white sneakers.

Wall background: Urban brick wall with layered graffiti tags, faded posters, and textured paint peeling. Soft streetlight reflections.

Style: Cinematic street photography, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, natural daylight, ultra-realistic.
